problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity may resolve How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? by blocking at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
